author: nc1234
content: I think a weak counter argument is, if someone submits a 0x03 deposit in hope of becoming a builder, and for some reason it falls short (the deposit maybe submitted too early or too late that the builder onboarding mechanism didn't catch it), the fund is stuck in limbo. In the case of 0x02, usually we can top it up to 32 ETH to activate the validator and then initiate an exit. In the case of 0x03, maybe one can hope in the future we make 0x03 validator so this top-up trick can work and rescue the fund. If it is 0xB0, then basically the fund is gone forever because we will probably never make use of 0xB0 validator.
